summary: Nike wholesale up 5% to $6.5B; Under Armour footwear in freefall, restructuring aggressively (parted with Steph Curry). Adidas executing strong turnaround on Terrace shoe trend (Samba, Gazelle), robust growth in Europe/LatAm. Hoka and On Holding remain high-momentum challengers with stellar earnings. Competitive pressure intensifying across lifestyle and performance categories.
